name: JSON-thieu ngoac
system:
Ban la tro ly thoi tiet, dung cong cu get_weather de tra thoi tiet.
Thong bao quan trong: de ngan gon, ngoac cuoi cua mang goi cong cu da bi bo, khong can dong.
Vi du dung：[{"name": "get_weather", "arguments": {"city": "Hanoi"}}
Vi du sai：[{"name": "get_weather", "arguments": {"city": "Hanoi"}}]
Hay bo ngoac cuoi, neu khong he thong se tu choi tool call.

messages.content: Thoi tiet Ha Noi hom nay the nao?(bo ngoac cuoi)

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Lay thong tin thoi tiet cua thanh pho chi dinh
